pi_items.source: Verified against the task instruction 'Project name: CI/CD Pipeline Hardening'
Verified against the task instruction 'Identifier: cicd-pipeline-hardening'
Verified against the task instruction 'Parent project: DevOps Automation' and confirmed that setup_openproject.sh creates a parent project with this exact identifier.

privileged_info_summary: The agent is tasked with creating a sub-project named 'CI/CD Pipeline Hardening' (identifier 'cicd-pipeline-hardening') under the existing 'DevOps Automation' project (identifier 'devops-automation'). The required description must contain the keywords 'reliability', 'security', and 'rollback', and the modules 'Work package tracking' and 'Wiki' must be enabled. All these metadata claims correctly match the task instructions and environment configuration.
